selection_reason: V3 adds weak-label extraction for hotel names/features, hotel distance, budget kinds, room type, restaurant names, activity time windows, and long-distance taxi rules. It improves validation F1 from 0.6734 to 0.7032 and raises V9 hard-fail semantic family hit rate from 2/15 to 9/15 on codex_rand30_s131.
fallback_reason: Previous 122-label active model; slightly narrower but useful if downstream code expects the old label vocabulary.
